sourceSummary.oneLine: Curriculum vitae for NamKyu Hur, Approver, listing education, quality and regulatory experience, training, and participation in detector certification projects.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports RA/regulatory submissions by documenting the approver's education, QA/RA experience, training history, and participation in KGMP, CE MDD, FDA, and NRTL certification activities.
keyPoints: NamKyu Hur is identified as Approver.
Education listed as Howon University, department of computer science, Kunsan, Korea.
Experience includes QC Manager and Q.A/R.A Manager roles at multiple companies.
Training includes ISO13485:2016 and medical device quality manager training.
Participated in H&abyz Detector HAD1717MC and ADD (HAD1417MCW) KGMP, CE MDD, and FDA certification projects.
ADD (HAD1417MCW) NRTL certification and first factory review are listed as passed.
